assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md line 12-13 shows JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 68 with identical JQL. Both required labels are present in the search.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 29-31: "Current issue TC-8021 stream suffix: `[rhtpa-2.1]` -- stream 2.1.x" and "Preemptive task TC-8022 summary contains: `(rhtpa-2.1)` -- matches the current issue's stream". triage-outcome.md line 72: "TC-8022 summary contains `(rhtpa-2.1)`, which matches TC-8021's stream scope of 2.1.x." The filtering explicitly checks the task summary for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 53-59: PROPOSED action creates link with inwardIssue: "TC-8021", outwardIssue: "TC-8022", type: "Depend". Rationale on line 60 states: "The standard remediation linkage is 'Depend'". triage-outcome.md line 76: "Link TC-8021 to TC-8022 with 'Depend'". Final state table line 174: "TC-8021 links: Depend: TC-8022".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 64-70: PROPOSED edit sets TC-8022 labels to ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"] -- security-preemptive is removed. Line 70: "The security-preemptive label is removed because TC-8022 is no longer preemptive -- it is now linked to the proper stream-specific CVE Jira (TC-8021). The task transitions from a proactive/provisional status to a standard remediation task." triage-outcome.md final state table line 175 confirms: TC-8022 labels change from "ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123, security-preemptive" to "ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123".

assertion_results.text: Step 7 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md lines 92-94: "Outcome: No new remediation tasks need to be created. Step 4.4 reconciliation determined that TC-8022 already covers remediation for CVE-2026-55123 in the 2.1.x stream." reconciliation.md line 102: "Step 7 (Remediation): Skips task creation for stream 2.1.x because the reconciliation recorded that TC-8022 already provides remediation coverage." Final state table line 177: "New tasks created | -- | None (TC-8022 reconciled)".
